title: SKU
description: SKU canonical v1 contract for Product Master. A SKU can be complete or active without being sellable; sellable belongs to Operational Core.
$comment: Sources: PACK-02 sections on SKU canonical and Product Activation dependency. TODO: final SKU lifecycle values are not fully enumerated in the source documents.

sku_code.description: Canonical SKU code such as A1/CS/DM/HS from the 20 SKU formula catalog.

public_name.description: Public product name for the SKU.

dietary_type.description: Dietary grouping from the 20 SKU catalog: Vegan / Man. TODO: confirm exact English label for Man.

formula_version_id.description: Linked current Formula Version, usually G1 for operational production.
